title: Hippeastrum carmineum
taxonomy: Hippeastrum carmineum is classified within the family Amaryllidaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as amaryllis or lily. This family consists of about 75 genera, including Hippeastrum. Hippeastrum carmineum is further classified as a species within the genus Hippeastrum, which is native to South America. The genus Hippeastrum is a group of flowering bulbs that are often referred to as the "Amaryllis" due to their similar appearance. Hippeastrum carmineum's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Amaryllidaceae family.
